outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH - Short gamma regime active with -7.84B total GEX. Dealers will amplify all directional moves. Expect acceleration on any break of the 630-640 RESONANCE range.
outlook.summary: Price trapped between 630-640 RESONANCE levels in extreme short gamma regime. Massive volume at 635 creates price magnet. Mixed sentiment: 0DTE reverse smirk (bullish) conflicts with WEEKLY/MONTHLY smirk and extreme PCR 3.71. Break of either boundary triggers volatility explosion.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH: Total GEX at -2.47B indicates dealers are short gamma across all expiries. This amplifies price movements and increases volatility. Expect sharp directional moves on any momentum trigger.
outlook.summary: Market exhibits heavy put positioning with bearish skew in WEEKLY and MONTHLY expiries (ratio 1.23-1.31). Spot at 562.58 sits just above critical 560 support. Negative gamma environment (-2.47B total) creates volatile regime where dealers must sell into weakness and buy into strength, accelerating moves. 0DTE Max Pain at 579 provides upside magnet. Key inflection: hold 560 for bounce toward 575-580; break targets 550 structural support.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected. Net negative GEX (-16.27B) amplifies price moves. Spot pinned at critical structural junction with extreme intraday volume signals pending directional breakout.

Max Pain at 6600 provides upside magnetic target. High PCR (3.46 monthly) suggests extreme bearish positioning - potential for short squeeze if 6400 resistance breaks.

Significant bearish skew in Weekly/Monthly tenors confirms hedging pressure. Upside is capped by Call Walls, while Max Pain (24150) provides a strong magnetic attraction above spot.
